name: Atlantean Technology
description: Atlantean Technology, within the context of Atlantean lore, refers to the purported advanced scientific and engineering capabilities possessed by the legendary civilization of Atlantis. Claims range from energy crystals and anti-gravity devices to advanced healing techniques and weather control. Originating in Plato's dialogues *Timaeus* and *Critias*, the concept has been elaborated upon by various esoteric and alternative history writers. Proponents suggest evidence lies in alleged ancient artifacts, unexplained megalithic structures, and connections to sacred geometry. Authors like Ignatius Donnelly and later proponents link Atlantis to the origins of civilization and the diffusion of advanced knowledge. Mainstream scholarship views Atlantis as a myth, a philosophical allegory, or a misinterpreted historical account, lacking concrete archaeological evidence to support the existence of an advanced civilization. The technological claims are often dismissed as pseudoscientific projections based on modern anxieties and desires for a lost golden age. Further, the lack of testable hypotheses and reliance on anecdotal evidence render the concept scientifically unfounded. The idea of Atlantean technology continues to be a popular theme in fiction and New Age spirituality.
subtitle: Lost wonders of a sunken empire.

claims.claim: Atlantis possessed advanced crystal technology for energy generation and healing.
claims.evidence: References in esoteric literature, purported psychic readings, and interpretations of ancient symbols.
claims.criticism: Lack of physical evidence, unsubstantiated claims, and misinterpretations of historical symbols. Crystal power is not scientifically proven.

claims.claim: Atlanteans utilized anti-gravity technology for construction and transportation.
claims.evidence: Unexplained megalithic structures, theories about ancient levitation techniques, and interpretations of ancient texts.
claims.criticism: Mainstream engineering principles explain megalithic construction, no verifiable anti-gravity technology exists, and textual interpretations are often speculative.

claims.claim: Atlantean technology included sophisticated weather control systems.
claims.evidence: Legends of powerful Atlantean rulers controlling the elements, interpretations of ancient myths, and theories about manipulating atmospheric energies.
claims.criticism: No scientific evidence supports weather control technology in ancient times, and legends are often symbolic rather than literal.

keyFigures.name: Ignatius Donnelly
keyFigures.role: Popularized Atlantean theories in his book *Atlantis: The Antediluvian World*

keyFigures.name: Graham Hancock
keyFigures.role: Author who explores lost civilizations and ancient mysteries, often referencing Atlantean concepts

keyFigures.name: Kenneth Feder
keyFigures.role: Archaeologist and skeptic who debunks pseudoscientific claims about Atlantis and ancient technologies

timeline.event: Ignatius Donnelly publishes *Atlantis: The Antediluvian World*
Atlantean themes become popular in science fiction and New Age spirituality

sources.author: Kenneth Feder
sources.work: Frauds, Myths, and Mysteries: Science and Pseudoscience in Archaeology
sources.title: Kenneth Feder

sources.author: Shirley Andrews
sources.work: Atlantis: Insights from a Lost Civilization
